Bio:
Anjali Nigam is the Attorney and Owner of The Nigam Law Firm, located in Houston, Texas. Licensed to practice in Texas since 2001, Ms. Nigam earned her Juris Doctor from the University of Houston Law Center. She has trained at some of the best litigation firms in Texas, gaining extensive experience litigating cases on both sides of the aisle in state and federal courts nationwide. Her well-rounded background includes handling personal injury, commercial, class action, and antitrust matters, providing her with valuable insight into defense strategies that now benefits her plaintiff clients.

As the founding attorney of The Nigam Law Firm, Ms. Nigam focuses on representing clients who have experienced traumatic and life-changing events, including personal injury cases, sexual abuse and trauma, and human trafficking. A recognized leader in her field, she has been selected to Super Lawyers from 2017 to 2025 for her work in personal injury law. Known as a tenacious fighter, Ms. Nigam is a frequent speaker on trial law topics and has presented at events hosted by the Houston Trial Lawyers Association, State Bar of Texas, and University of Texas Law School. Her dedication to clients and aggressive advocacy set her apart in providing personalized representation for those who have been hurt.

Bio:
Alexander J. Houthuijzen, known as "Alex the Defender," is the Owner and Attorney at Alexander J. Houthuijzen, Attorney-At-Law, PLLC, a criminal defense firm located in downtown Houston, Texas. Licensed to practice in Texas since November 2016, Alex graduated from South Texas College of Law Houston in May 2013, one of the nation's most recognized trial advocacy programs. During his academic career, he earned numerous "best advocate" awards while competing in nine select varsity law school advocacy tournaments under the guidance of the late Colonel Hillard, a JAG officer. His dedication to mock trial competition and stellar academic performance laid the foundation for his aggressive yet compassionate approach to criminal defense.

Alex practices in both state and federal courts, handling a wide range of criminal matters including murder, manslaughter, DWI/DUI, sexual assault, controlled substances, domestic violence, aggravated robbery, white collar crimes, and criminal appeals. He has successfully achieved dismissals and favorable reductions for numerous clients, with case results available on his firm's website. Selected to Super Lawyers Rising Stars for 2025 in Criminal Defense, Alex has built a reputation as a tireless advocate who prioritizes his clients' freedom and rights. Operating from his office at 917 Franklin Street in Houston, he serves clients with the same passion and commitment that defined his journey from award-winning law student to respected criminal defense attorney.

SOME OF THE TOPICS COVERED IN BOOK LISTED BELOW
Traumatic Brain Injury: A Neurosurgeon’s Perspective… Gary E. Kraus…
Traumatic Brain Injury / TBI … mild TBI , moderate TBI , severe TBI … imaging of TBI including MRI , DTI ( diffusion tensor imaging ), Tractography, functional MRI ( fMRI ), CT , MRI scans

Title: Managing Partner
Company Location: 11807 Westheimer Rd #550, Houston, TX 77077, United States
Company Description:
AMHA is a company that specializes in assisting patients who elect to receive “Alternative, Integrated” medical care at facilities throughout the U.S and internationally. Traditionally these providers require their patients to pay cash up-front for their medical care. Many practices offer some form of a receipt or bill to their patients but do not offer any assistance as it pertains to the preparation and submission of the bills to the patient's insurance company.  The majority of patients have little to no experience when dealing with their insurance companies and the complex issues involved with claims processing.  Therefore just supplying a master bill does not always overcome the challenges placed by insurance companies. Considering the cost associated with any medical treatment you want the best opportunity at receiving a reimbursement.  

When offering perspective patients the option of reimbursements (from their insurance company) patients will find it easier choosing to visit a facility knowing that there is a chance of an insurance reimbursement. This helps reduce the financial stress for those patients and allows them to concentrate on their travel and treatment. All of AMHA's current clients do not accept insurance and they expect payment up-front for the services provided. AMHA's service cost nothing to the practices we represent, providers of care only refer AMHA's services to their patients and AMHA deals directly with patients to handle the billing. If AMHA succeeds, then patients can afford to return for additional treatments and therefore both the patients and the practice benefit from our service. As a third-party patient advocate company AMHA takes you facility practice out of the equation. AMHA's service has proven to be a boom for the practices we represent in both added traffic from new and returning patients!

Company Description:
One of the nation’s preeminent plaintiffs’ law firms, Seeger Weiss is best known for multidistrict mass torts and class actions in both state and federal court. From offices in New York, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, and Massachusetts, the firm has represented over 10,000 individuals, companies, and governments across the U.S. who have been injured or defrauded on a massive scale.
Since its founding in 1999, it has led many of the most complex and high-profile cases in the country: the National Prescription Opiate Litigation, which the Washington Post called “the largest federal court case in U.S. history”; 3M Combat Arms Earplug Products Liability Litigation, which the Minneapolis Star Tribune called “one of the largest mass torts ever”; the ongoing “Dieselgate” scandal; the sprawling multistate litigation on behalf of survivors of child sexual abuse; and the history-making Football League Players’ Concussion Injury Litigation.
Unlike many plaintiffs’ firms, Seeger Weiss doesn’t simply “collect” clients for other lawyers to serve. We go to court and get results, regularly winning amounts in hundreds of millions and billions of dollars on behalf of large classes of injured clients. Whatever the case, we have the experience and resources necessary to go toe-to-toe with the biggest and best-funded corporations in America.
We are proud to share the Seeger Weiss Diversity Fellowship as a part of our ongoing commitment to recruiting, retaining, and promoting attorneys from underrepresented backgrounds.

Company Description:
Flynn Law, LLC  is s small firm that provides the kind of legal representation found in big law firms at much more reasonable rates.  We represent and provide legal advice to businesses, large or small, regardless of their industry, individuals, and insurers.
The Firm was stared in 2018 because Jared Flynn saw the need in the legal marketplace for a younger lawyer who could draw upon real jury trial experience to represent his clients.  Rather than focusing on billable hours, as many firms require, Mr. Flynn wanted to focus exclusively on applying common sense and creativity to aggressively represent and counsel his clients.  Also, understanding that lawsuits can be expensive, Mr. Flynn desired to have the flexibility to offer fee arrangements that allowed clients the opportunity for high quality legal representation at reasonable rates.
Flynn Law handles litigation and counsels clients in matters involving contracts, trade secrets, non-compete agreements, non-solicitation agreements, real estate, personal injury, construction, product liability, premises liability, oil and gas, energy, insurance coverage, and intellectual property.
Flynn Law also serves as outside general counsel to several businesses assisting in that particular company's everyday legal needs.  This includes negotiating contracts, drafting and reviewing agreements, ensuring compliance with applicable regulations, handling litigation and resolving employment controversies.
Flynn Law earns its clients trust by being responsive, making sound decisions, and providing strategic advice and welcomes the opportunity to earn your trust as well.
